faq.description: Everything you need to know about Auditora.ai.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions

urlLimitations.question: If it only reads my public website, how can it identify real risks?
urlLimitations.answer: It can't — and we don't claim it does. The instant diagnostic identifies structural and logical risks based on industry patterns and the inferred process structure. Think of them as intelligent hypotheses, not operational findings. It's like the first question a good consultant would ask after seeing your website: "given what you do, these are the most likely risks." Real precision comes when you use the guided conversation or the full platform with actual operational context.

vsChatgpt.question: How is this different from using ChatGPT to generate processes?
vsChatgpt.answer: Three fundamental differences. First, methodology: every session follows the SIPOC framework with automatic gap detection — ChatGPT doesn't know what it hasn't asked you. Second, deliverables: diagrams are real BPMN 2.0, exportable to XML, not rough sketches. Third, persistence: processes, risks, and mitigations are saved, tracked, and evolve over time — they're not chats that get lost.

dataAccess.question: What data do you access from my website exactly?
dataAccess.answer: We read text content from up to 5 public pages: homepage, about, services, and similar. The same content any visitor sees in a browser. We don't access internal systems, APIs, databases, or protected areas.

bpmKnowledge.question: Do I need BPM or BPMN knowledge to use the tool?
bpmKnowledge.answer: No. Auditora.ai is designed so anyone who knows their business can use it. The AI asks the right questions in plain language, and technical notation is generated automatically. If you're a BPM consultant, the tool accelerates your work. If you're not, the tool handles the technical work for you.

deepening.question: Can I go deeper than the instant report?
deepening.answer: Yes. After the diagnostic, you can start a guided conversation with the AI. It asks specific questions about your operations — suppliers, inputs, activities, outputs, customers — and builds a much more detailed analysis. At the end, you receive a complete FMEA with failure modes and Risk Priority Number (RPN) per activity.

dataSecurity.question: Is my data secure?
dataSecurity.answer: Yes. Encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest. Anonymous sessions expire in 24 hours. We never use your information to train AI models. When you create an account, your data is stored in your organization's private workspace with complete isolation.

accountMigration.question: What happens to my analysis if I create an account?
accountMigration.answer: Everything migrates automatically. Your process map, risk analysis, guided conversation, and generated deliverables transfer intact to your account. You don't lose anything.

vsProcessMining.question: Is this process mining?
vsProcessMining.answer: No. Process mining analyzes system logs (ERP, CRM) to discover how processes actually execute. Auditora.ai is an elicitation-based process discovery tool — it guides conversations to document processes and analyze risks. They're complementary approaches: process mining needs system data, Auditora.ai needs human knowledge.

hero.title: Document processes in minutes, not weeks
hero.subtitle: Auditora.ai guides elicitation conversations with artificial intelligence, generates BPMN diagrams in real time, and runs automatic risk analysis. For consultants and auditors who value their time.
hero.subtext: Paste any URL. The AI analyzes your public context and generates a free initial diagnostic with process map and risks.

alt.badge: The missing tool for your practice
alt.title: Every undocumented process is a risk you're signing off on
alt.subtitle: Your clients have critical processes nobody has mapped. Auditora.ai discovers them for you: AI-guided elicitation, automatic BPMN diagrams, and risk analysis with severity scoring. In a fraction of the time it would take you alone.
alt.cta: See free diagnostic of my business
alt.subtext: Enter your corporate URL. Receive a process map and risk analysis in minutes — no signup, no commitments.

card1.title: Weeks of interviews, diagrams nobody reads
card1.description: Schedule meetings. Take notes by hand. Spend hours in Visio or Lucidchart translating what you heard into BPMN. Send draft. Wait for corrections. Repeat. A single process can take 2-4 weeks. Your client already lost patience.

card2.title: $50,000 tools that need data you don't have
card2.description: Celonis, Minit, UiPath Process Mining — all promise to discover processes automatically. But they need system logs, ERP access, technical integration. Your client doesn't even have a properly implemented CRM. Process mining isn't for 95% of businesses.

card3.title: Copy-pasting into ChatGPT isn't a methodology
card3.description: Yes, you can ask ChatGPT to generate a BPMN. The result is generic, has no real business context, doesn't follow an elicitation methodology, and gives you nothing you can defend before a committee. It's a band-aid, not a professional tool.

solution.title: An AI copilot that knows how to elicit processes
solution.description: Auditora.ai isn't a generic chatbot or a process mining tool. It's a process discovery platform that combines the SIPOC methodology with artificial intelligence to guide elicitation, document in BPMN 2.0 in real time, and generate risk analysis with severity scoring — all during the conversation, not after.

diff1.title: Real methodology, not generic prompts
diff1.description: Every conversation follows the SIPOC framework (Suppliers, Inputs, Process, Outputs, Customers). The AI detects coverage gaps and generates contextual questions to fill them. It doesn't improvise — it investigates.

diff2.title: BPMN 2.0 diagrams as you talk
diff2.description: Don't transcribe, don't redraw. The diagram builds during the session. Exportable to XML, compatible with Camunda, Signavio, and any BPMN tool.

diff3.title: Automatic structural risk analysis
diff3.description: Every process activity is evaluated against potential failure modes. You receive an FMEA matrix with Risk Priority Number (RPN), not a generic list of "possible risks".

howItWorks.title: See what the AI discovers from your public information alone
howItWorks.subtitle: This diagnostic uses only your public web pages. It's a starting point — not a final audit. If this surprises you, imagine the result when you give it real context.

step1.title: Enter your URL
step1.description: The AI reads up to 5 public pages from your site — homepage, about, services. The same content any visitor sees.

step2.title: Context inference
step2.description: Identifies your industry, main services, and selects the most critical process. Generates an initial SIPOC map and process diagram.

step3.title: Risk diagnostic
step3.description: Evaluates structural risks in the identified process: logical gaps in the flow, fragile dependencies, uncontrolled points. Scores by severity and probability.

step4.title: Deepen with guided conversation
step4.description: Optionally, enter a Q&A session with the AI. The more context you provide, the more specific and actionable the analysis becomes. At the end, you'll receive a complete FMEA.

howItWorks.disclaimer: Risks identified in the instant diagnostic are logical inferences based on process structure, not detections of actual operational problems. For specific findings, use the guided conversation or the full platform.

deepDive.title: A guided conversation that builds your analysis
deepDive.subtitle: The instant diagnostic is the appetizer. The guided conversation is where Auditora.ai differentiates from every other tool.
deepDive.methodDescription: The AI doesn't ask you to "describe your process". It asks targeted questions based on gaps it detects in your SIPOC map:
deepDive.question1: "You mentioned 3 suppliers but only 1 input. Who else provides materials or information to this step?"
deepDive.question2: "Your process has 5 activities but no branching. Is there a point where the flow changes based on a condition?"
deepDive.question3: "You identified the end customer but not the internal customer. Who receives this step's output before it reaches the customer?"
deepDive.methodNote: Each question closes a specific gap. No generic questions.
deepDive.outputTitle: What you get at the end

guided.label: After guided conversation
guided.analysis: Complete FMEA with RPN per activity

platform.title: From a free diagnostic to your process management system
platform.subtitle: The free scan shows what the AI can do. The platform is where you do real work with your clients.

feature1.title: Process library
feature1.description: All mapped processes in one place. Search, filter, and navigate the process inventory for each client.

feature2.title: Guided discovery sessions
feature2.description: Start elicitation sessions with the AI as copilot. Contextual questions based on SIPOC coverage in real time.

feature3.title: Automatic BPMN diagrams
feature3.description: Diagrams are generated and updated during the session. Export XML, PNG, or PDF. Compatible with Camunda, Signavio, Bizagi.

feature4.title: Risk management & mitigation
feature4.description: Every identified risk becomes a trackable item. Assign owners, define mitigation plans, monitor progress.

feature5.title: Team collaboration
feature5.description: Invite your team. Share processes, assign sessions, review deliverables. Granular roles and permissions.

feature6.title: Professional deliverables
feature6.description: Export client-ready reports: process maps, RACI matrices, risk analyses, process cards.

platform.cta: Create free account — your diagnostic is preserved
platform.ctaSubtext: Everything you generated in the free scan migrates automatically to your account.

pillar1.title: Industry-recognized frameworks
pillar1.description: SIPOC (Six Sigma), BPMN 2.0 (OMG), FMEA (ISO/SAE). We didn't invent anything. We automate the same tools the best consultants already use.

pillar2.title: Full transparency
pillar2.description: We tell you exactly what the AI can and can't do. The instant diagnostic identifies logical risks, not operational ones. Precision improves with every minute of context you provide. No exaggerated promises.

pillar3.title: Your data is yours
pillar3.description: Encrypted in transit and at rest. Anonymous sessions expire in 24 hours. We never use your information to train models. GDPR compliant.

testimonial3.quote: The traceability of the SIPOC methodology gives us the evidence we need for internal audits. It's not a black box.
